codeReview.summary: The fix commit directly resolves the prior blocking FCPXML URI truncation for relative source paths, adds targeted regression coverage for both relative and absolute source_file values, and updates CLI export --output help text to match actual default behavior.

summary: Pass: e98301f addresses the original export-engine failure by fixing _asset_src path handling and adding path-fidelity regressions; the CLI --output default-path help text is also corrected as requested.
